meaning: adv.髱槫ｸｸ蝨ｰ,譏ｾ闡怜慍,蠑穂ｺｺ豕ｨ逶ｮ蝨ｰ
examples: Herbal remedies are remarkably successful in treating eczema.

The academy takes the endeavor seriously enough to protect that remarkably rigorous voting process.
